title: PM Domain Legacy V1-To-V2 Migration Planning
objective: Define the bounded plan for mapping legacy PM-related source data into the validated canonical PM/work schema without performing migration DML, changing the packet-007 SQL bundle, or changing runtime code.
required_inputs: Legacy PM-related lineage surfaces in the current platform and source repositories
constrained_outputs: A planning handoff note under c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/ops/agents/handoffs/
A source-to-target migration strategy with explicit non-goals
A legacy-source inventory and mapping summary
No migration DML, no cutover execution, no runtime code changes
validation_steps: Confirm packet 008 is treated as complete and authoritative input
Confirm the migration plan maps legacy sources into the validated canonical work schema without reopening schema design
Confirm explicit non-goals exclude DML, SQL bundle rewrites, and runtime implementation
Confirm cutover risks, data-quality risks, and unresolved lineage gaps are named explicitly
sql_permission_note: Planning only. No migration DML, DDL changes, or runtime code changes are authorized in packet 009.
